extraction.one_line_summary: RODRÍGUEZ Carlos soloed to the stage win in Morzine while POGAČAR gained time bonuses to close within 10 seconds of yellow jersey VINGEGAARD Jonas
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam sacrificed personal result to lead out POGAČAR for time bonus, revealing UAE's willingness to burn GC domestiques
VINGEGAARD collected 26 KOM points to tie polka dot lead, demonstrating proactive defense of jersey competition against attacks
RODRÍGUEZ Carlos attacked teammates POGAČAR and YATES to solo win, showing INEOS rookies prioritize stage wins over team orders

rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: positive: Tour rookie descended aggressively to hold off chasers with teammates behind, demonstrating confidence beyond GC support role
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: reduced GC gap from 9 to 10 seconds via time bonuses despite not winning, showing consistent pressure tactics
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: retained yellow but gained only minimal time despite stage designed for attacks, suggesting defensive rather than offensive strength
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: chased back to lead out POGAČAR instead of contesting finish, confirming pure domestique role despite top-10 GC position
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: negative: dropped to fourth overall one second behind RODRÍGUEZ despite defending podium, revealing vulnerability on sustained climbs
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: negative: involved in early high-speed crash on wet descent, exposing JUMBO-VISMA's reduced depth for stage support
